name: Minature Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom of six paper-lined muffin cups.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) for 5 minutes.
3. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese, remaining sugar, lemon juice, grated lemon peel, vanilla, and egg until well blended.
4. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the graham cracker crust in each muffin cup, filling them about 3/4 full.
5. Return the muffins to the oven and bake at 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) for an additional 25 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before carefully removing from the paper cups.
7. Chill thoroughly before serving.
8. Top with garnishes just before serving. For best results, wrap chilled cheesecakes individually in plastic wrap and freeze. Allow to come to room temperature for 40 minutes before garnishing and serving.
